violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Stainless refrigerator set at 36.5F, unit thermometer 44-49F. Internal food temps found at 44-45F. -Beef in back room has external temp of 44F, top shelf at ambient temp of 38F. *Ensure air flow is not impeded by storage.

General equipment and utensils - Use limitations of certain materials. — --Material of food contact equipment/utensil did not meet durability characteristics or are a limited use material. -Single use portion cup used/left in pico as a scoop. -Single use solo cup left in bulk sugar as scoop. *Scoops should be washable and have handle.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Some grease build up at exterior filter area of microwave on cook line. -Carbon residue in bottom of right oven. -Some frost build up in upright (coil) freezer in back room. -Some frost build up in basement chest freezers (most noted at left unit).

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Case of toilet paper stored on floor in basement.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -2 stacks of trays at make line are not stored inverted.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. -Phone on cutting board of right make table. *COS-removed and wiped down with sanitizer.
